Telecommunications Case

Module Housing and Connector Set for Telecommunications Equipment

module housing / connector support / assembly fit

IndustriesTelecommunications
Part Functionmodule housing / connector support / assembly fit
Manufacturing CapabilitiesCNC housing machining, connector features, surface treatment coordination and inspection reporting

Project Scenario

The case combined enclosure parts with connector-related features, so matched delivery mattered more than isolated components.

Manufacturing Plan

01Part Function ReviewConfirm assembly position, load conditions, operating environment and validation goals.
02Process and Material MatchingMatch process, material, tolerance, surface and batch requirements before production.
03Inspection and DeliveryPrepare delivery records around critical dimensions, appearance and assembly feedback.

Delivery Result

The matched parts helped check assembly fit, connector alignment and enclosure finishing at the same time.
